rationale: The proposed increase to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption concerns property tax appraised value. Educ. Code §38.015 governs student self-administration of asthma or anaphylaxis medicine. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters with no statutory interdependency.
quote: SELF-ADMINISTRATION OF PRESCRIPTION ASTHMA OR ANAPHYLAXIS MEDICINE BY STUDENTS.
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax change and education health/safety statute. No cross-reference between Tax Code §11.13 and Educ. Code §38.015 identified in rule_text.
